{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201611473855CD1C2DC41D008D05"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7313926356214448923","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，想问一下作者是怎么做到按时更新的！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1702906350,"group_id":"7289014352366013499","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢你～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyjmk8ETupkRpGY3Ra65JedFTS+RkZdvGVryjo7J1m9T","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cd3a327e53264075a47fc73bf4602eba~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536946&x-signature=RBl8vRScn9P9eHV6yA7Qz4HYAcQ%3D","user_id":"4033488796266704","user_name":"纤书书"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4033488796266704","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7289014352366013499","book_info":{"abstract":"【纯爱+双洁+1v1+双向奔赴+He+至死不渝】
        “我耳机带多了。”钟四季装模作样，“你再说一遍好么，我听不见。”徐梨海凑近，“我喜欢你!我喜欢你!我好喜欢你。”他调皮往耳朵轻轻吹气，“听到么?”
      钟四季脑袋抖了抖，转头，徐梨海正笑吟吟看着他。
    “ 我还是没有听见，你能不能再多说几遍。我耳朵不好使。”
     多年后……
     徐梨海扯着嗓子，“ 老头，发什么呆呢?”
     钟四季呆呆傻傻道，“ 我有点印象。” 
     他苍老有斑点的手点着他自己和徐梨海，“这个人和这个人有点熟悉，我好像认识他们。”
      “认识，认识大半辈子了。”徐梨海回想以前，眼尾有点湿润，笑着说，“那天回家你还帮我脱了鞋。”钟四季耳背，沉稳而苍老的声音喊起来，“什么，你托儿爷?”
    徐梨海只好再大点声，“ 我是说——你那天还非常积极帮我脱了鞋，还给我穿了拖鞋。”
     “啊你姥爷? ”
     “不是欸——我是说我的鞋。"
     “不放血?你要放什么血?
      徐梨海喊得脑袋发晕，他吼着嗓子好笑道，“ 叫你带耳机，这下真聋了吧！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3e57c0068e869ffe9a301f205dcf1296~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"侯服玉食","author_id":"","book_id":"7289014352366013499","book_name":"一个发疯的作者","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#585070","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7291237602794209850","read_count":"2","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"601603"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"319","tags":"双男主,现代,甜宠,1v1,双洁,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o3e57c0068e869ffe9a301f205dcf1296~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779178307&x-signature=tR6j7HNoty%2FKBO%2Bfx9Z%2FACQRtZo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2834990989322109","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201611473855CD1C2DC41D008D05"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_cou
